BETTER_STACK_INGESTING_HOST.reason: Server-side logging endpoint used by the web runtime.

BETTER_STACK_SOURCE_TOKEN.reason: Server-side logging credential consumed by the web runtime.

HOME_SERVER_STATS_API_KEY.reason: Admin-only home-server API credential consumed by the web runtime.

HOME_SERVER_STATS_URL.reason: Admin-only home-server API endpoint consumed by the web runtime.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN.reason: Sentry DSNs are client configuration, not write credentials.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NUTSNEWS_IOS_APP_STORE_URL.reason: Public app-store link rendered by the web runtime.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.reason: Supabase public anon key; database policy remains the security boundary.

NUTSNEWS_EDGE_FEED_SNAPSHOT_URL.reason: Worker edge snapshot endpoint consumed by the web runtime.

RESEND_API_KEY.reason: Contact email delivery credential consumed by the web runtime.

AUTH_GOOGLE_ID.reason: No current web, Worker, or VPS consumer found; keep excluded pending ownership review.

AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET.reason: No current web, Worker, or VPS consumer found; keep excluded pending ownership review.

AUTH_SECRET.reason: No current web, Worker, or VPS consumer found; keep excluded pending ownership review.

OPENAI_API_KEY.reason: Worker-owned credential; no current VPS web runtime usage. Review before enabling.

OPENAI_INPUT_COST_PER_1M_TOKENS.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_INPUT_TOKENS_PER_REVIEW_ESTIMATE.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_OUTPUT_COST_PER_1M_TOKENS.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_OUTPUT_TOKENS_PER_REVIEW_ESTIMATE.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

ACTIONS_READ_TOKEN.reason: No current application, Worker, or VPS consumer; keep excluded until an owner and consumer are reviewed.

SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.reason: Vercel build/source-map credential; not a VPS runtime credential.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.reason: Worker-owned privileged credential; never copy without an explicit VPS consumer review.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA.reason: Deployment metadata; it is not stable VPS configuration.

patterns.reason: Preview/development configuration must not enter VPS production.
Browser-only or service-specific configuration requires an explicit consumer review.
